faqs.question: What are your business hours?
faqs.answer: Our business hours are Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM EST. We are closed on weekends and major holidays.

faqs.question: How can I contact customer support?
faqs.answer: You can contact our customer support team via email at support@example.com, or call us at 1-800-123-4567 during business hours.

faqs.question: What is your return policy?
faqs.answer: We offer a 30-day return policy for all unused items in their original packaging. Please visit our Returns Center to initiate a return.

faqs.question: Do you ship internationally?
faqs.answer: Yes, we ship to most countries worldwide. Shipping costs and delivery times vary depending on the destination.

faqs.question: How long does shipping take?
faqs.answer: Domestic shipping typically takes 3-5 business days. International shipping can take 7-14 business days depending on the destination.

faqs.question: What payment methods do you accept?
faqs.answer: We accept Visa, MasterCard, American Express, PayPal, and Apple Pay. All payments are processed securely.

faqs.question: How do I track my order?
faqs.answer: Once your order ships, you'll receive a tracking number via email. You can also track your order by logging into your account.

faqs.question: Can I cancel my order?
faqs.answer: Orders can be cancelled within 1 hour of placement. After that, please contact customer support for assistance.
